name: Karaoke instrumental request form with StemSplit AI and Google Drive

parameters.content:
# Karaoke instrumental request form

## Who it is for
Karaoke hosts, DJs, music teachers, and community teams who want visitors to request a vocal-free instrumental by email without manual processing.

## What it does
Collects song details through an n8n form, removes vocals with the [StemSplit](https://stemsplit.io) AI API, uploads the MP3 to Google Drive, and emails the requester a download link.

## How it works
1. Visitor submits email, song title, and a public audio URL on the form.
2. The workflow validates the URL and checks the StemSplit credit balance.
3. StemSplit separates the track and returns an instrumental MP3.
4. The file uploads to Google Drive and Gmail sends the link to the requester.

## How to use
1. Connect credentials listed in **Sticky Note - Setup**.
2. Activate the workflow and copy the Form Trigger **Production URL**.
3. Test with a short public MP3 and an inbox you control.

## Setup

1. **StemSplit API** on both StemSplit nodes — [stemsplit.io/app/settings/api](https://stemsplit.io/app/settings/api)
2. **Google Drive OAuth2** on **Upload to Google Drive** (choose a folder or keep root)
3. **Gmail OAuth2** on all three Gmail nodes
4. Install **n8n-nodes-stemsplit** if it is not already available ([verified integration](https://n8n.io/integrations/stemsplit/))

## 4. Error notifications

Emails the requester when the URL is invalid or when StemSplit credits are below 60 seconds.

## Google Drive

Set a destination folder in **Upload to Google Drive**, or keep the default root. The uploaded file name is derived from the song title submitted on the form.

values.formSubmittedText: Thanks! We're creating your instrumental — check your inbox in a few minutes.

parameters.formDescription: Submit a public link to your song (MP3, WAV, or FLAC). We'll remove the vocals with StemSplit AI, save the instrumental to Google Drive, and email you the link.

parameters.message:
=Hi,

Your karaoke instrumental for "{{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songTitle }}" is ready.

Download from Google Drive:
{{ $json.webViewLink }}

Direct link (if shared):
{{ $json.webContentLink || $json.webViewLink }}

— Sent automatically via n8n + StemSplit
parameters.subject: =Your karaoke instrumental is ready: {{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songTitle }}

parameters.message:
=Hi,

We received your karaoke instrumental request for "{{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songTitle }}", but the song URL was invalid.

Please submit again with a direct, publicly accessible link to an MP3, WAV, or FLAC file (must start with https://).

URL you provided:
{{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songUrl }}
parameters.subject: =We could not process your karaoke request: {{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songTitle }}

parameters.message:
=Hi,

We received your request for "{{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songTitle }}", but the StemSplit account does not have enough credits to process the track right now.

Please try again later or contact the site owner to top up credits at stemsplit.io.

Your song URL (not processed):
{{ $('Normalize form data').item.json.songUrl }}
parameters.subject: =Karaoke request paused — StemSplit credits low
